_meta.rule: Keep low-polysemy terms only. Substring collisions (ffs matches handoffs/jeffs-mini) ruin the signal. Space-delimited phrases preferred.

frustration.description: Jeff-to-role direct anger. High specificity; profanity + named failure words.

relief.description: Jeff-to-role confirmation. Narrow — drop polysemous (exactly/perfect/thank you) to avoid catching setups for criticism.

precursor.description: Role-side patterns that precede frustration. EXPERIMENTAL — vocabulary-only precursors are noisy; production version needs LLM labeling or structured session-turn pattern detection (#2454-followup).
